labels.analysis: The MCP Server "info.mosaique/mcp" provides 10 tools focused on news & media tasks. Core capabilities include data access and reading, search and retrieval. Key tools: Recent_Headlines_About, Headlines_About, Relations_Graph, Recent_Comments_by_Author, Recent_Headlines.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "News & Media" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: article, headline.

tools.name: Recent_Headlines_About

id.description:
The id of the object found using the Search tool.
Supported:
    - article (ends with six alphanumeric characters)
    - country (like "United States")
    - facet (person, organization like "United Nations")
    - perspective (like "US-China relations")
